subject: Properties of Expectation
question: Let $X$ and $Y$ be random variables with joint pdf $$f_{XY} = \begin{cases} \frac{\alpha-1}{y^\alpha} & y > 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$$ where $\alpha > 1$. Determine the best estimator $g(x)$ of $Y$ given $X$.
